meaning: n.虚张声势的人,恃强凌弱的人v.威吓
examples: Early immigrants like Hector St. Jean de Crevecoeur praised highly the freedom and opportunity to be found in this new land.
They hit up Hector for the last $250.
I suppose you'll hector me until I phone him.
Just prior to the Arizona hack, one of Lulzsec's founders, Hector Monsegur, Sabu, had been arrested.
The chipmaker also named Chief Operating Officer Dirk Meyer to succeed Hector Ruiz as CEO.
